title: Manufacturing Engineer - Shree Cement - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Shree Cement - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Shree Cement are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Shree Cement:
Shree Cement is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shree Cement!
